name: BTLE
summary: BTLE is a free and open-source Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) Software Defined Radio software suite and [open BTLE chip design](https://github.com/JiaoXianjun/BTLE/tree/master/open_btle_baseband_chip).

documentation.readme: BTLE is a free and open-source Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) Software Defined Radio software suite and [open BTLE chip design](https://github.com/JiaoXianjun/BTLE/tree/master/open_btle_baseband_chip).

function_signatures.description: Pairs with the Bluetooth system-prompt stanza in core.ai_backend.chain to teach the LLM the standard invocation pattern.

function_signatures.name: operator_initiated_the_chain_step_is_gated_by_the_per_step_accept_cancel_gate_the_tool_does_not_auto_execute
function_signatures.description: Operator-initiated: the chain step is gated by the per-step ACCEPT/CANCEL gate; the tool does not auto-execute.

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with ukBaz/python-bluezero (score=11); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with pybluez/pybluez (score=11); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with mackowiakd/BLE-Security-PoC (score=11); pair in the chain planner.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: Index entry in the Bluetooth category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner after a NVD/lookup pass on the target vendor.
Pairs with the Bluetooth system-prompt stanza in core.ai_backend.chain to teach the LLM the standard invocation pattern.
Operator-initiated: the chain step is gated by the per-step ACCEPT/CANCEL gate; the tool does not auto-execute.
Use as a reference implementation when designing a new v3 method for this category.
Use as a teaching example in the prompt stanza so the LLM can reason about the right run order.
